items.title: TN bill would allow death penalty for women who have an abortion
items.dek: “ Two Tennessee Republican lawmakers have proposed a bill to allow the death penalty for women who have abortions. The bill would classify abortion as fetal hom
items.body: “ Two Tennessee Republican lawmakers have proposed a bill to allow the death penalty for women who have abortions. The bill would classify abortion as fetal homicide and remove current legal protections for pregnant women. The legislation is supported by some faith leaders and the Foundation to Abolish Abortion. If passed, the bill would take effect on July 1 but would not allow for retroactive prosecutions.” Damn. submitted by /u/Medical_Corruption [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Divers recover bodies of seven Chinese tourists from bottom of Lake Baikal
items.dek: A Russian driver also died when their mini-bus plunged under the ice to the bottom of the lake in Siberia.
items.body: A Russian driver also died when their mini-bus plunged under the ice to the bottom of the lake in Siberia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump ups tariffs day after Supreme Court ruling against him
items.dek: The president will increase import taxes to 15% on most products coming into the US from Tuesday.
items.body: The president will increase import taxes to 15% on most products coming into the US from Tuesday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
